home.title: Поставщики соревнуются.

home.step1Desc: Опишите объём, бюджет и сроки. DEWEB мгновенно направляет бриф проверенным поставщикам.
home.step2Desc: Поставщики подают цену, сроки и портфолио — вы сравниваете предложения рядом.
home.step3Desc: Выберите лучшее, оплатите DEWEB и отслеживайте этапы до сдачи с защитой эскроу.

home.ctaFinalSubtitle: Опубликуйте проект сегодня. Пусть поставщики соревнуются. Выберите лучшее предложение.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Marketplace tips, tech guides, and growth strategies from the DEWEB team.

how-competitive-bidding-saves-it-budgets.title: How competitive bidding saves IT budgets
how-competitive-bidding-saves-it-budgets.excerpt: Why posting projects to multiple suppliers drives better pricing and faster delivery.
how-competitive-bidding-saves-it-budgets.body1: Traditional IT procurement often means negotiating with a single vendor — leaving money and options on the table. Competitive bidding changes that by inviting verified suppliers to submit offers side by side.
how-competitive-bidding-saves-it-budgets.body2: On DEWEB, clients post a brief with budget and timeline. Suppliers compete with transparent pricing, portfolios, and delivery plans. You compare everything in one dashboard before choosing.
how-competitive-bidding-saves-it-budgets.body3: The result: average savings of 15–30% on project costs, faster turnaround, and higher confidence in your supplier choice.

choosing-the-right-web-stack.title: Choosing the right web stack in 2026
choosing-the-right-web-stack.excerpt: Next.js, WordPress, or custom — how to pick the best foundation for your project.
choosing-the-right-web-stack.body1: Your web stack affects speed, scalability, and long-term maintenance costs. Next.js excels for modern apps and SEO; WordPress fits content-heavy sites with easy admin access.
choosing-the-right-web-stack.body2: We help clients evaluate trade-offs: team skills, content needs, integrations, and budget. The right choice depends on your goals, not trends alone.
choosing-the-right-web-stack.body3: DEWEB suppliers specialize across stacks — post your project and receive tailored recommendations with competitive bids.

ai-automation-for-small-business.title: AI automation for small business
ai-automation-for-small-business.excerpt: Practical AI workflows that save hours without enterprise budgets.
ai-automation-for-small-business.body1: AI isn't just for big tech. Small businesses use chatbots, email automation, and CRM sync to handle support and operations around the clock.
ai-automation-for-small-business.body2: Start with high-repetition tasks: lead qualification, appointment booking, invoice reminders. Custom agents can integrate with tools you already use.
ai-automation-for-small-business.body3: DEWEB connects you with AI specialists who scope, build, and deploy automation — with milestone-based delivery and escrow protection.

escrow-payments-why-they-matter.title: Why escrow payments matter for IT projects
escrow-payments-why-they-matter.excerpt: Protect both clients and suppliers with milestone-based DEWEB coin escrow.
escrow-payments-why-they-matter.body1: IT projects involve trust on both sides. Clients worry about delivery; suppliers worry about payment. Escrow holds funds until milestones are approved.
escrow-payments-why-they-matter.body2: DEWEB uses DEWEB coins (1:1 USDT) locked in escrow when you accept a proposal. Funds release as work completes — reducing disputes and fraud.
escrow-payments-why-they-matter.body3: Transparent milestones, chat moderation, and verified suppliers make remote IT deals safer for everyone.

building-trust-with-verified-suppliers.title: Building trust with verified suppliers
building-trust-with-verified-suppliers.excerpt: How DEWEB vets talent and keeps marketplace quality high.
building-trust-with-verified-suppliers.body1: Not every freelancer is equal. DEWEB verifies supplier profiles, portfolios, and track records before they bid on projects.
building-trust-with-verified-suppliers.body2: Customers see ratings, past work, and skills upfront. Suppliers build reputation through successful deliveries and client reviews.
building-trust-with-verified-suppliers.body3: Verification plus competitive bidding creates a marketplace where quality rises and bad actors get filtered out.

ecommerce-trends-2026.title: E-commerce trends to watch in 2026
ecommerce-trends-2026.excerpt: Headless commerce, mobile-first checkout, and AI-powered personalization.
ecommerce-trends-2026.body1: E-commerce keeps evolving. Headless setups offer flexibility; mobile checkout optimization drives conversion; AI personalizes product recommendations.
ecommerce-trends-2026.body2: Payment diversity — cards, wallets, crypto — matters for global audiences. Fast load times and Core Web Vitals affect both SEO and sales.
ecommerce-trends-2026.body3: Whether Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom — DEWEB suppliers compete to build stores that convert and scale.
